title: KandyToys 26 Piece Magnetic Letters - Perfect for Educational Toys Fridge Magnets and Spelling
features: Magnetic lower case alphabet set: A great learning resource for youngsters.
Educational Tool: Help little ones learn the alphabet and basic spellings with magnetic letters in the correct letter shapes. Introduce your child to letter recognition and sounds.
Stick to metal surfaces like fridges and freezes, the classic fridge magnet.
Fun bright colours: The letters come in a mix of fun bright colours to keep youngsters engaged with their letters.
description: 26 Brightly coloured magnetic lower case letters Suitable for ages 6+
